author_rating_explanation: Last author Christian Wressnegger is affiliated with KASTEL Security Research Labs, Karlsruhe Institute of Technology (KIT), Germany. KIT is a well-known European research university with concrete AI/CS research output, placing it in the 6-8 band for top European schools/labs. First author Gabriela F. Ciocarlie is at Stevens Institute of Technology, a mid-tier US research university, but the strongest verifiable affiliation drives the score into the 6-8 range.
